entries.title: Hunter-Nin
entries.subtitle: Class
entries.snippet: Hunter-Nin Hunter's Creeds

entries.title: Blade Warden
entries.subtitle: Hunter-Nin · Creed

entries.title: Necrotic Hand
entries.subtitle: Hunter-Nin · Creed
entries.snippet: Hunters who follow an offensive Medical teaching, using necrosis to fight off enemies with cold-eyed, surgical efficiency.

entries.title: Grave Stalker
entries.subtitle: Hunter-Nin · Creed
entries.snippet: Consumed by the thrill of the hunt, these Hunter-Nin become whispers in the dark — hunting via camouflage, infiltration, and shadow-strikes.

entries.title: Undertaker
entries.subtitle: Hunter-Nin · Creed
entries.snippet: Brutal, imposing, impossible to ignore — relentless juggernauts trained to break bones, crush morale, and shatter resistance.

entries.title: Void Walker
entries.subtitle: Hunter-Nin · Creed
entries.snippet: Hunters who weaponize Time & Space ninjutsu, specializing in hit-and-run tactics — teleporting in and out of combat as easily as blinking.

entries.snippet: Battlefield academics — tactical specialists who turn combat into an exercise in planning, preparation, and overwhelming knowledge.

entries.title: Ammunition
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Requires ammunition to fire. Roll your ammunition die each time you attack; on a 1 or 2 the die size drops. If used in melee, it's an improvised weapon.

entries.title: Blocking
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: While equipped, your AC increases by +1. The bonus applies once and does not stack.

entries.title: Critical
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Gains +1 to your Critical Threat range per rank of Critical when attacking with it (max +3). Does not stack when dual-wielding.

entries.title: Deadly
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: On a critical hit, adds +1 damage die per rank of Deadly, once per turn (max rank 3).

entries.title: Disarm
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: In place of one weapon attack, attempt to disarm a target creature.

entries.title: Evocation
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Combat Scroll only. Seals an echo of a Ninjutsu, Genjutsu, or weapon you know into the scroll. Attacks use that source's attack bonus and damage type, no…

entries.title: Finesse
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: You may use either your Strength or Dexterity modifier for attack and damage rolls (must use the same for both).

entries.title: Flexible
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Lists a secondary damage type in parentheses (e.g. Flexible (Bludgeoning)). You choose the damage type when rolling damage, but the damage die is one step…

entries.title: Grapple
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: In place of one weapon attack, attempt to grapple a target creature.

entries.title: Heavy
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Requires Strength 16 or higher to wield without disadvantage. Creatures add half their Strength modifier to damage rolls with it.

entries.title: Hidden
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Advantage on Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks to conceal the weapon.

entries.title: Lethal
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Adds +1 damage die against a surprised creature or one that can't see you, per rank of Lethal, once per turn. Stacks up to rank 5.

entries.title: Light
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Small and easy to handle. Once per turn, while dual-wielding two light weapons, you can make a second attack with the off-hand weapon as part of the Attack…

entries.title: Loading
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: A limited number of shots between reloads. Reloading uses the Use an Object action and requires a free hand.

entries.title: Multiattack
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: May be used to attack again as a bonus action. You can't add your ability modifier or any damage bonuses to the bonus-action damage — only the weapon's base…

entries.title: Range
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Ranged weapon. Two numbers in parentheses: normal range in feet / maximum range. Beyond normal range: disadvantage on the attack. Beyond long range: cannot…

entries.title: Reach
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Adds 5 feet to your reach per rank of Reach when attacking with it (e.g. Reach 1 = +5 ft).

entries.title: Returning
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: After a thrown ranged attack within 30 ft, you may recall the weapon to your hand. Requires one free hand to catch.

entries.title: Thrown
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: You can throw the weapon to make a ranged attack using Strength (not Dexterity) for attack and damage rolls.

entries.title: Tactical
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Once per turn, deals +1 damage per rank of any physical condition on the target (e.g. Bruised 3 + Bleed 2 → +5 damage).

entries.title: Trip
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: In place of one weapon attack, attempt to Trip or Shove a target. On success, deals the weapon's damage.

entries.title: Two-Handed
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Requires two hands to use.

entries.title: Unarmed
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Equipped to both hands; cannot be disarmed. Doesn't block Taijutsu stances. You can still use Hand Seals and Chakra Seals and wield a separate weapon. Uses your…

entries.title: Versatile
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Can be wielded with one or two hands. The parenthetical damage applies when used two-handed in melee.

entries.title: Volatile
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: No ability modifier added to damage. If your d20 result is ≤ the Volatile rank, the weapon backfires and deals its damage to you. If the damage die is increased…

entries.title: Winding
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: In place of a weapon attack, wind up the weapon. Your next attack with this weapon has advantage.

entries.title: Special
entries.subtitle: Weapon Property
entries.snippet: Has a unique ability — see the specific weapon's entry (e.g. Battle Wire's trap actions).

entries.title: Bulky
entries.subtitle: Armor Property
entries.snippet: Grants disadvantage on Stealth checks.

entries.title: Bulwark
entries.subtitle: Armor Property
entries.snippet: +2 bonus to saving throws and checks made to resist being moved against your will.

entries.title: Camouflage
entries.subtitle: Armor Property
entries.snippet: +2 bonus to Stealth checks at Night.

entries.title: Fashionable
entries.subtitle: Armor Property
entries.snippet: +2 bonus to Persuasion checks against non-hostile creatures.

entries.title: Fortified
entries.subtitle: Armor Property
entries.snippet: Treats the first critical hit against you per rest as a normal hit.

entries.title: Heavyweight
entries.subtitle: Armor Property
entries.snippet: Imposes a Strength ability score requirement to wear without penalty (the requirement is listed in parentheses with this property).

entries.title: High Quality
entries.subtitle: Armor Property
entries.snippet: Gains +1 Seal Slots for Armor Seals.

entries.title: Lightweight
entries.subtitle: Armor Property
entries.snippet: Reduces the armor's Bulk by half.

entries.title: Reinforced
entries.subtitle: Armor Property
entries.snippet: Gains Damage Reduction against Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage. The DR value is listed in parentheses with this property.

entries.title: Threatening
entries.subtitle: Armor Property
entries.snippet: +2 bonus to Intimidation checks.
